title: Chrome Tee
description: A definitive heavy-weight essential. The Chrome Tee is cut from 280GSM long-staple cotton with a peach-skin finish that softens with each wash. Features anti-odor silver-ion treatment, a boxy silhouette, and dropped shoulders for an architectural drape.
materials: 100% long-staple cotton (280GSM). Peach-skin enzyme wash. Silver-ion anti-odor finish. Ribbed crew neck with reinforced taping. Double-needle hem and cuffs. Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach. Iron low if needed.

title: Ind Hoodie
description: The Ind Hoodie represents tactical comfort. Constructed from 400GSM French terry with a Yukon fleece lining, it provides thermal regulation across variable conditions. Features a triple-panel hood, kangaroo pocket with hidden zip enclosure, and rear embossed silicone label.
materials: 100% French terry cotton (400GSM). Yukon fleece lining. Triple-panel hood with woven drawcord. Kangaroo pocket with YKK® zip enclosure. Embossed silicone label at back. Ribbed cuffs and hem. Machine wash cold inside out. Tumble dry low. Do not iron print area.

title: Nylon Cap
description: Engineered for the field. The Nylon Cap features a ripstop nylon shell with laser-cut rear perforation for airflow. Quick-dry sweatband, pre-curved brim, and adjustable snapback closure. Structured six-panel construction maintains shape through extended use.
materials: Ripstop nylon shell (210D). Laser-cut rear perforation. Quick-dry polyester sweatband. Structured six-panel construction. Pre-curved brim with reinforced stitching. Adjustable snapback closure. Spot clean. Do not machine wash or tumble dry. Store flat.
